issues.objection: 7.22 preserves literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus alongside the engineering layer. STRETCHED tag is explicit where the metaphysical reach exceeds operational scope. Engineering layer offers operational reflection at narrower scope, not replacement of the verse. Source pack carries Shankara/Ramanuja with their copyright holders cited. The quotable line is anchored on engineering specifics, not on the verse's metaphysical claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims Krishna is the actual granter (mayaiva vihitān); engineering analog operates at proximate-vs-upstream attribution scope (the framework is the vehicle; the customer-need-and-substrate is what actually grants the result). Counter-example carves out accidental success without disciplined practice.

notes: Trivialization check for 7.22: the original is preserved, the engineering layer is additive at honest scope. PASS.
